nasb.text: So she departed from the place where she was, and her two daughters-in-law with her; and they went on the way to return to the land of Judah.

esv.text: So she set out from the place where she was with her two daughters-in-law, and they went on the way to return to the land of Judah.

cnv.text: 她離開居住的地方，兩個媳婦也隨她出發，要回到猶大地去。

ccb.text: 她们离开所居住的地方，启程返回犹大。

csbs.text: 这样她与她的两个儿媳妇一起，从所住的地方出来，上路返回犹大地。
